title: Delete dead code: 7 init helpers + fab_get_rules orphan + bootstrap-guide atomic (PAIRED COMMIT)
description: Per D17/D32: delete 7 unused helper functions in init.ts:1383-1554 (~170 LoC); remove fab_get_rules tool implementation (never registered, no compat burden). Per D-pairing: same commit also lifts bootstrap-guide.ts:41 raw write to atomic via shared helper. Knip (TASK-028) will then have a zero-baseline.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — dead code removal + paired bootstrap-guide atomic migration

files.change: Delete lines 1383-1554 (7 dead helpers including writeNewFile, etc.)
Audit fab_get_rules export; remove if never registered (Domain Expert finding); update tests
Verify only registers the actual tool, not orphan
Line 41: replace raw fs.writeFileSync with atomicWriteText from shared (paired in same commit per D-pairing)

criteria: init.ts shrinks by ~170 LoC; existing tests still pass (no callers existed)
fab_get_rules removed; grep confirms no references remain
Knip (TASK-028) reports zero unused exports after this lands

metadata.commit_pairing: Bootstrap-guide atomic in same commit as dead code removal (per Q2 cleanup grouping)
